# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-http-from-ingress
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
          namespace: linkerd-viz

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-http
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-http-from-frontend
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: api-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-grpc
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-grpc-from-worker
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: api-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: worker
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-http
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-http-from-api
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: app

      app: inventory
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

  name: inventory-http-from-api
  namespace: app

  server:
    name: inventory-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: app

    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---

  name: orders-http-from-api
  namespace: app

  server:
    name: orders-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-tcp
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-tcp-from-orders
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: database-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-tcp-from-payments
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: database-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: worker-metrics
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  port: 9095
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: worker-metrics-from-prometheus
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: worker-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-http
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: admin
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-http-from-ops
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ops-console
          namespace: ops
